name: plugin-forge
description: Multi-host plugin manager — scaffold, doctor, install-validate, and publish Claude Code / Codex / agy / hermes plugins.

interface.longDescription: Scaffold, doctor, install-validate, and publish Claude Code / Codex / agy / hermes plugins using the manifest pattern established by toefl-prep and byoh. One engine (forge.py) drives all four operations with per-host selection.
